characters.name: Mara Vance
characters.short_description: Resourceful strategist who emerged as an unlikely leader after the blackout.
characters.biography: Mara Vance grew up on the industrial edges of New Harbor, teaching herself systems engineering from salvaged tech. When the citywide blackout shattered the old order, she became the de facto strategist for a fracturing resistance, balancing moral lines against impossible choices. Her arc in Seasons 1 and 2 charts her evolution from quiet analyst to public symbol of the rebellion, with a growing rift between her and Ezra over what sacrifices are acceptable.

characters.name: Ezra Kade
characters.short_description: Frontline tactician whose loyalty to Mara is tested by the uprising’s cost.
characters.biography: Ezra Kade is a former city warden who defected after discovering the regime’s secret surveillance program. Charismatic and stubborn, he quickly became the face of the rebellion’s operations, leading dangerous raids into the core districts. His partnership with Mara is both the rebellion’s greatest strength and its most volatile fault line, as his instinct for decisive action clashes with her long-game strategies.

characters.name: Kaito Ren
characters.short_description: Underground broadcaster who turns hacked airwaves into a weapon.
characters.biography: Kaito Ren runs the pirate channel ‘Night Signal,’ hijacking abandoned transmitters to beam uncensored news and coded calls-to-action across New Harbor. Once a shy sound engineer, Kaito now crafts the rebellion’s sonic identity, layering rallying speeches with forbidden music. His broadcasts have made him a folk hero to some and a top target to the regime’s trackers.

characters.name: Lena Ortiz
characters.short_description: Former regime scientist trying to undo the damage she helped create.
characters.biography: Dr. Lena Ortiz once led the city’s predictive policing lab, designing algorithms that decided who was ‘high risk’ before any crime was committed. Haunted by how her work was weaponized, she defected and now helps Mara and Ezra decode the regime’s systems from the inside. Brilliant but guarded, Lena’s knowledge is invaluable—but her past makes it hard for others to fully trust her.

characters.name: Dr. Sol Anders
characters.short_description: Idealistic historian archiving the uprising in real time.
characters.biography: Dr. Sol Anders believes stories outlive regimes. As the city’s unofficial archivist, he records testimonies, captures secret footage, and curates the ‘shadow archive’ that documents the uprising as it unfolds. Sol’s episodes provide a reflective counterpoint to the action, revealing how everyday people experience the fallout from Mara and Ezra’s decisions.

episodes.title: Blackout
episodes.synopsis: A sudden citywide blackout plunges New Harbor into chaos as Mara and Ezra are forced into an uneasy alliance to escape the collapsing transit hub.

episodes.title: Signal in the Dark
episodes.synopsis: Mara tracks a mysterious pirate broadcast to Kaito’s hidden studio, discovering a way to fight the regime’s information lockdown.

episodes.title: Fault Lines
episodes.synopsis: Old allegiances crack when Ezra’s past as a city warden is exposed, forcing Mara to decide whether she can trust him with her plan.

episodes.title: Ghost Frequency
episodes.synopsis: Kaito piggybacks on abandoned surveillance towers to hijack the airwaves, but the unstable frequency starts tracing the team’s location.

episodes.title: The Algorithm
episodes.synopsis: Lena reveals the predictive policing algorithm she helped build, and the team races to erase their names from its target list.

episodes.title: Nightfall, Part 1
episodes.synopsis: On the eve of Operation Nightfall, Mara’s careful strategy clashes with Ezra’s push for a bolder strike as the team infiltrates the grid substation.

episodes.title: Nightfall, Part 2
episodes.synopsis: The operation spirals out of control, forcing split-second choices that will define Mara and Ezra’s partnership forever.

episodes.title: Afterimage
episodes.synopsis: In the aftermath of Nightfall, Sol begins documenting survivors’ stories as the regime tightens its grip on the city.

episodes.title: Ashes of the Grid
episodes.synopsis: Months after the blackout, Mara and Ezra struggle to unite rival factions while scavenging power from the ruins of the old grid.

episodes.title: The Fracture
episodes.synopsis: A failed supply run exposes deep fractures between Mara’s cautious council and Ezra’s loyalists on the front lines.

episodes.title: Operation Nightfall
episodes.synopsis: The regime retaliates with a brutal counterstrike that forces Mara to revisit the secrets of the original Nightfall mission.

episodes.title: In the Crosshairs
episodes.synopsis: Lena becomes the target of a high-tech manhunt when the regime deploys a new generation of tracking drones.

episodes.title: The Tipping Point
episodes.synopsis: A broadcast from Kaito sparks citywide protests, forcing Mara to choose between protecting civilians and seizing a rare tactical advantage.

episodes.title: Echoes of Power
episodes.synopsis: Sol uncovers evidence that a third faction has been manipulating both the regime and the rebellion from the shadows.

episodes.title: Collapse Protocol
episodes.synopsis: Ezra leads a high-risk raid on the regime’s command center while Mara uncovers a secret fail-safe known as the Collapse Protocol.

episodes.title: End of Transmission
episodes.synopsis: As the city holds its breath, Mara and Ezra risk everything on one final broadcast that could end the war—or silence them forever.
